lessons: Staff wins only when sword sightings exceed 50 (rounds 17, 20) — avoid using it when sword sightings are <20 (rounds 13–16, 19), as we die to bows and grapples with no counter.
Deadeye (bow) killed us in round 15 and Scorpion (grapple) in rounds 11 and 16 — avoid open terrain; bows outrange staff and grapples close faster than we can react.
Sword users (GhostProtocol, Hook, Lancer, Valkyrie, Warden) are our top targets — we killed 8 with 0 deaths in rounds 17 and 20 when sword sightings were high (>30); prioritize them aggressively when
Reaper (staff) killed us in round 19 — avoid 1v1 duels against other staff users; they match our range and outmaneuver us in close quarters due to superior mobility or timing.
Teleport_surge rounds (14, 19) correlate with 0 kills and high deaths — adopt defensive posture during teleport_surge; we lost both rounds with no kills and low survival.
Shield sightings spiked in round 20 (297) — avoid engaging shield users head-on; they negate our staff range and force us into unfavorable melee.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Sword has the highest kill efficiency against dominant enemy weapons (swords) and enabled 8 kills with 0 deaths in our two winning rounds (17 and 20), while staff fails without high sword presence.
